s1.subtitle: Expert cleaning, restoration and care for Oriental rugs, antique textiles and investment-grade carpets.

aboutSection.title: About Heirloom® Rug Cleaning
aboutSection.desc1: We provide cleaning and restoration services for Oriental rugs and investment textiles. We clean and protect all types of rugs, from simple synthetics to finely hand-knotted antiques.
aboutSection.desc2: We have worked for generations to perfect our process to ensure that your rugs look, feel and smell amazing when they are returned to your home. We even offer a Pet Satisfaction Guarantee for the removal of some stains, urine, and other pet odours. This is one of the most common reasons that customers request our comprehensive rug cleaning services.

items.i3: State of the art equipment & the biggest facility from here to Toronto
items.i5: Certified to clean even the most delicate rugs
items.i6: Drop off, pick up, & shipping options are available

petProof.title: Pet Proof Rug Padding
petProof.desc: One of the best ways to protect your rug is to have a quality rug pad underneath your rug. We work with one of the top rug pad manufacturers to offer you great options for high traffic, extra padding and protection for spills (or puppy accidents).

featuredServices.title: Area Rug Cleaning in Calgary, Okotoks, & De Winton

trust.label: Why Heirloom®
trust.title: A Legacy of Care & Craftsmanship
trust.description: For over five decades, Calgary families have trusted Heirloom® with their most treasured rugs. Our facility is the largest dedicated rug cleaning plant from here to Toronto.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Comprehensive Rug Care
services.subtitle: From routine cleaning to complex restoration, we handle every type of rug with the expertise it deserves.

cleaning.title: Rug Cleaning
cleaning.description: Full-immersion washing tailored to each rug's fiber, dye and construction. Safe for silk, wool, cotton and synthetics.

repair.title: Rug Repair & Restoration
repair.description: Expert reweaving, fringe repair, binding and patching to restore your rug's structural integrity and beauty.

stain.title: Stain & Odor Removal
stain.description: Advanced treatment for pet stains, wine, food and other stubborn marks. We eliminate odors at the source.

protection.title: Rug Protection
protection.description: Fiber protection treatments and custom-cut rug pads to extend the life of your investment.

appraisal.title: Rug Appraisal
appraisal.description: Professional evaluation of your rug's origin, age, condition and market value for insurance or estate purposes.

pickup.title: Pickup & Delivery
pickup.description: Complimentary pickup and delivery throughout Calgary, Okotoks and De Winton. Shipping available across Canada.

process.label: Our Process
process.title: How We Care for Your Rugs
process.subtitle: Every rug receives a personalized treatment plan based on its unique characteristics.

step1.title: Inspection & Assessment
step1.description: We examine fiber type, dye stability, construction and pre-existing conditions to create a custom cleaning plan.

step2.title: Dusting & Pre-Treatment
step2.description: Deep mechanical dusting removes embedded soil, followed by targeted pre-treatment of stains and problem areas.

step3.title: Full-Immersion Wash
step3.description: Your rug is gently washed using controlled water flow and pH-balanced solutions specific to its fiber type.

step4.title: Drying & Finishing
step4.description: Climate-controlled drying preserves shape and texture. Final grooming and inspection ensure flawless results.

t1.text: Heirloom brought our 80-year-old Persian rug back to life. The colors are vibrant again and it smells wonderful. Truly exceptional service.
t1.author: Margaret T.

t2.text: We've trusted Heirloom with our entire collection for over 15 years. Their attention to detail and care is unmatched in the city.
t2.author: David & Susan R.

t3.text: After our dog had an accident on our silk rug, we thought it was ruined. Heirloom removed every trace of stain and odor. Incredible work.
t3.author: Jennifer L.

cta.title: Ready to Restore Your Rug's Beauty?
cta.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation estimate. We offer complimentary pickup and delivery in the Calgary area.

hoursLocation.locationsDesc: We have two locations. Our Calgary drop-off centre and our main cleaning facility in Diamond Valley.

aboutUsPage.pageSubtitle: Family-owned specialists in fine rug cleaning, textile care, and industry-leading expertise.
aboutUsPage.introDesc1: At Heirloom® Rug Cleaning, we are a family business dedicated to the specialized washing, cleaning, and protection of fine Oriental rugs and collectible textiles. We combine time-honoured techniques with modern equipment to deliver the most thorough care possible for customers in Calgary and throughout Southern Alberta.
aboutUsPage.introDesc2: Most of us have grown up in this business, and that experience shapes the standard of care we bring to every rug.

greg.name: Greg
greg.bio1: Greg is a second-generation rug cleaner and the founder of Heirloom® Rug Cleaning. When he recognized that the industry lacked truly high-quality equipment, he set out to build it himself.
greg.bio2: He went on to found Centrum Force, where he began manufacturing premium rug-cleaning equipment and developing innovative machines that improved the process, making it more effective, efficient, and reliable.

gabriel.name: Gabriel
gabriel.bio1: Gabriel is a third-generation rug cleaner who has been involved in the trade since he could crawl. Over the years, he has learned from some of the world's leading rug-cleaning professionals and now helps his father, Greg, operate the family business.
gabriel.bio2: He is also often the voice customers hear when they call. Gabriel is committed to making sure every client receives attentive service and leaves fully satisfied with the care we provide.

brock.name: Brock
brock.bio1: Brock is also a third-generation rug cleaner. Like Gabriel, he has been learning about rugs and textile care since childhood. He handles much of the rug washing and brings a sharp eye for detail to every piece that comes through our facility.
brock.bio2: His focus is simple. Make sure every rug leaves looking its absolute best.

aboutUsPage.commitmentDesc: Together, we are committed to delivering the highest level of service possible, with craftsmanship, integrity, and genuine care behind every job.
aboutUsPage.leadershipDesc1: Heirloom® Rug Cleaning is also known across North America and overseas for its consulting services. We have helped other companies solve complex rug-cleaning challenges and outfit their facilities with modern rug-washing equipment designed to clean and protect antique, heirloom-quality area rugs from around the world.
aboutUsPage.leadershipDesc2: We have also played a role in developing revolutionary, state-of-the-art equipment for the rug-cleaning and protection industry. Heirloom® was the first company in Canada to have the unique Centrum Force® Synergy System. Only one other company in Canada has access to this exceptional equipment.

rugCleaningPage.pageSubtitle: Professional rug cleaning for Calgary and the surrounding area, with specialized care for fine rugs and luxury textiles.
rugCleaningPage.introTitle: Specialized Care for Your Finest Rugs
rugCleaningPage.intro1: At Heirloom® Rug Cleaning, we understand that your area rugs are more than floor coverings. They are carefully crafted works of art and valuable investments that can last for decades with proper care. Area rugs bring luxury, comfort, and beauty to a space, and proper maintenance helps preserve their appearance and longevity. That is why we provide professional cleaning services for area rugs and fine textiles in our state-of-the-art facility, serving Calgary and communities throughout Southern Alberta.
rugCleaningPage.intro2: Do-it-yourself home cleaning is often ineffective and can damage delicate fibres. Our expert process combines time-honoured craftsmanship with modern technology, using powerful yet gentle cleaning solutions to remove dirt, stains, and odours while protecting the integrity of your rug. For cleaning that meets a higher standard, trust the specialists at Heirloom® Rug Cleaning.
rugCleaningPage.intro3: No matter the type or age of your rug, our skilled technicians can help restore its beauty, freshness, and vibrancy. We care for delicate Oriental rugs, Persian rugs, and other fine textiles with meticulous attention, respecting their value and sentimental significance as though they were our own family heirlooms.
rugCleaningPage.intro4: Every rug is unique, which is why we tailor our cleaning approach to each rug's materials, dyes, and construction. This customized method helps preserve and, in some cases, restore colours, patterns, and intricate finishes while protecting your rug for years to come. With one of Canada's largest facilities dedicated to fine textile care and advanced cleaning equipment, we deliver thorough, effective, and dependable service.

craftsmanship.title: Expert Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.desc: Our process combines time-honoured craftsmanship with modern technology, using powerful yet gentle cleaning solutions to remove dirt, stains, and odours while protecting the integrity of your rug.

everyType.title: Every Rug Type
everyType.desc: We care for delicate Oriental rugs, Persian rugs, and other fine textiles with meticulous attention, respecting their value and sentimental significance as though they were our own family heirlooms.

tailored.title: Tailored Approach
tailored.desc: We tailor our cleaning approach to each rug's materials, dyes, and construction. With one of Canada's largest facilities dedicated to fine textile care, we deliver thorough and dependable service.

sanitize.title: When Should I Sanitize My Rug?
sanitize.desc: There are several situations where sanitizing your rug is especially important.

reasons.petDesc: Pet accidents can leave behind bacteria that are difficult to eliminate. Regular cleaning is not always enough to remove all contaminants, and if left untreated, bacteria can continue to grow, potentially causing odours, health concerns, and long-term damage to your rug.
reasons.moldDesc: Mold growth is another common issue that requires thorough sanitization. Like bacteria from pet stains, mold can persist and spread if it is not completely removed, creating potential health risks and causing further damage to the rug.

sanitize.closing: These are two of the most common reasons sanitizing is necessary. Each situation requires the proper technique and cleaning solution to ensure complete removal, protect the rug, and support a clean, healthy environment.

whyChoose.label: Why Choose Us
whyChoose.title: Why Choose Heirloom® Rug Cleaning?
whyChoose.desc: Heirloom® Rug Cleaning has been serving Canada since 1967, bringing decades of experience to every rug we care for. Our cleaning and repair specialists combine expert knowledge with state-of-the-art equipment and facilities to deliver exceptional results. From delicate hand-knotted Oriental rugs to complex cleaning challenges, we provide efficient, thorough, and dependable service designed to leave your rugs looking their absolute best.
